news.title: Reliance Power rises 3.8%, marking its third consecutive session gain.
news.summary: Reliance Power rises 3.8%, marking its third consecutive session gain.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical surged 13.7%, topping Nifty 500; Reliance Power rose 6% to ₹22.7.
Nifty 50 gained 1.72%, Consumer Durables led sectors with 3.51% rise; PSU banks, realty also up.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical surged 13.7%, topping Nifty 500; Reliance Power rose 6% to ₹22.7.
Nifty 50 gained 1.72%, Consumer Durables led sectors with 3.51% rise; PSU banks, realty also up.

news.title:
Reliance Power saw a volume surge on 20 Mar 2026, trading over 1 crore shares.
Despite strong intraday performance, downgraded Mojo Grade signals caution for investors.
news.summary:
Reliance Power saw a volume surge on 20 Mar 2026, trading over 1 crore shares.
Despite strong intraday performance, downgraded Mojo Grade signals caution for investors.

news.title:
ED conducts raids at 10-12 locations linked to Reliance Power.
Focus on individuals connected to Reliance Power in Mumbai, Hyderabad.
news.summary:
ED conducts raids at 10-12 locations linked to Reliance Power.
Focus on individuals connected to Reliance Power in Mumbai, Hyderabad.

news.title:
ED raids Reliance Power offices over financial irregularities investigation.
Scrutiny raises concerns about Reliance Power's operations and compliance.
news.summary:
ED raids Reliance Power offices over financial irregularities investigation.
Scrutiny raises concerns about Reliance Power's operations and compliance.

news.title: Reliance Power denies media reports about ED raids at its locations.
news.summary: Reliance Power denies media reports about ED raids at its locations.

news.title:
Reliance Power ceased its Bangladesh subsidiary, contributing no revenue in FY25.
Net worth contribution was 35 lakhs; winding up occurred on March 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Reliance Power ceased its Bangladesh subsidiary, contributing no revenue in FY25.
Net worth contribution was 35 lakhs; winding up occurred on March 4, 2026.

news.title:
SC reviews SIT probe request into Reliance Power over ₹40,000 crore misappropriation.
Allegations involve violations under PMLA and FEMA by the Anil Ambani Group.
news.summary:
SC reviews SIT probe request into Reliance Power over ₹40,000 crore misappropriation.
Allegations involve violations under PMLA and FEMA by the Anil Ambani Group.

news.title:
Reliance Power saw exceptional volume surge and price gain on 3 Feb 2026.
Despite outperforming Sensex, technical indicators show caution for Reliance Power.
news.summary:
Reliance Power saw exceptional volume surge and price gain on 3 Feb 2026.
Despite outperforming Sensex, technical indicators show caution for Reliance Power.

news.title:
Reliance Power issued convertible warrants worth Rs. 1,524.6 cr; Rs. 694.7 cr received till Dec 2025.
Rs. 637.1 cr utilized, Rs. 26.5 cr unutilized; SEBI forensic audit ongoing, no deviation reported.
news.summary:
Reliance Power issued convertible warrants worth Rs. 1,524.6 cr; Rs. 694.7 cr received till Dec 2025.
Rs. 637.1 cr utilized, Rs. 26.5 cr unutilized; SEBI forensic audit ongoing, no deviation reported.

news.title:
Reliance Power's Q3 net profit drops to 251M INR from 420M YoY.
Q3 revenue rises to 18.7B INR from 18.5B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Reliance Power's Q3 net profit drops to 251M INR from 420M YoY.
Q3 revenue rises to 18.7B INR from 18.5B INR YoY.

news.title:
Reliance Power reported Dec 2025 quarter revenue of Rs 1872 Cr and profit before tax of Rs 100 Cr.
Two senior executives appointed; challenges in subsidiary RSTEPL include asset impairment and going concern risks.
news.summary:
Reliance Power reported Dec 2025 quarter revenue of Rs 1872 Cr and profit before tax of Rs 100 Cr.
Two senior executives appointed; challenges in subsidiary RSTEPL include asset impairment and going concern risks.

news.title:
ED attaches Rs 1,800-cr fresh assets of Reliance Group firms, raising total to Rs 12,000 cr.
The action is part of an ongoing investigation against Reliance Group chairman's companies.
news.summary:
ED attaches Rs 1,800-cr fresh assets of Reliance Group firms, raising total to Rs 12,000 cr.
The action is part of an ongoing investigation against Reliance Group chairman's companies.

news.title:
Reliance Power's Board to meet on Jan 30, 2026, to review and approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window for designated persons closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-outcome disclosure.
news.summary:
Reliance Power's Board to meet on Jan 30, 2026, to review and approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window for designated persons closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-outcome disclosure.

news.title:
NCLAT upheld Adani Power's Rs 4,000 crore acquisition of Vidarbha Industries Power, dismissing objections from Western Coalfields and an ex-employee.
The resolution plan complied with statutory norms, was approved within timelines, and followed Supreme Court guidelines on creditor payments.
news.summary:
NCLAT upheld Adani Power's Rs 4,000 crore acquisition of Vidarbha Industries Power, dismissing objections from Western Coalfields and an ex-employee.
The resolution plan complied with statutory norms, was approved within timelines, and followed Supreme Court guidelines on creditor payments.

news.title:
Reliance Power plunged 7.9% intraday as SEBI initiated a forensic audit over alleged violations.
Reliance Power's stock fell 50.3% in six months; related cases involve RHFL and Jai Anmol Ambani.
news.summary:
Reliance Power plunged 7.9% intraday as SEBI initiated a forensic audit over alleged violations.
Reliance Power's stock fell 50.3% in six months; related cases involve RHFL and Jai Anmol Ambani.

news.title:
Reliance Power announced the cessation of Shri Manoj Pongde as Head, Business & Legal, effective January 14, 2026.
The disclosure was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements, 2015.
news.summary:
Reliance Power announced the cessation of Shri Manoj Pongde as Head, Business & Legal, effective January 14, 2026.
The disclosure was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements, 2015.

news.title:
SEBI initiates forensic audit on Reliance Power Ltd for alleged violations of SEBI Act, SCRA, and Companies Act.
The audit seeks to probe compliance and irregularities; disclosure made on Jan 14, 2026.
news.summary:
SEBI initiates forensic audit on Reliance Power Ltd for alleged violations of SEBI Act, SCRA, and Companies Act.
The audit seeks to probe compliance and irregularities; disclosure made on Jan 14, 2026.

news.title:
ADAG stocks, including Reliance Infra and Reliance Power, fell up to 5% after CBI filed a fraud case involving Anil Ambani's son.
Reliance Infra hit a 52-week low, and Reliance Power dropped 4% amid ongoing probes into alleged fraud cases totaling ₹15,380 crore.
news.summary:
ADAG stocks, including Reliance Infra and Reliance Power, fell up to 5% after CBI filed a fraud case involving Anil Ambani's son.
Reliance Infra hit a 52-week low, and Reliance Power dropped 4% amid ongoing probes into alleged fraud cases totaling ₹15,380 crore.

news.title:
Reliance Capital moved from promoter to public category in Reliance Power.
BSE, NSE approved reclassification on Dec 8, 2025, under Insolvency Code.
news.summary:
Reliance Capital moved from promoter to public category in Reliance Power.
BSE, NSE approved reclassification on Dec 8, 2025, under Insolvency Code.
